name: claude-voice
description: Adds conversational TTS narration to Claude Code sessions using local Kokoro model
author: adjit

directory..claude-plugin/plugin.json: Plugin manifest with hooks and metadata
directory.hooks/system_prompt.py: Injects narration instructions into the system prompt
directory.hooks/on_output.py: Detects [NARRATE: "..."] markers and sends them to TTS engine
directory.src/model_manager.py: Auto-download Kokoro model on first use
directory.models/: Downloaded TTS model files (populated on first run)
directory.scripts/install.sh: Post-install script to download models and dependencies
